_description: Star system name generation templates. TODO: Full implementation. Systems should feel like real places — some named by explorers, some by corporations, some by the cultures that settled them. Naming style should reflect who claimed the system.
_design_notes: Explorer-named: Descriptive or personal (Kepler's Remnant, Pale Harbor, Thornfield)
Culture-named: Reflects parent civilization flavor tags (a 'Kestari' civ names systems differently than an 'Iron' civ)
Ancient/unclaimed: Catalog designations (HD 189733, Gliese 581) or evocative names from early surveys
The time_factor should influence naming — distorted systems might have eerie or warning-style names
_todo: Expand with: standalone names, catalog designations, civ-specific naming patterns, distorted-space naming pool, system descriptor words (binary, ringed, dark, etc.)
